items: Book brunch with Claire for Saturday at 11 AM
Ask dermatologist about follow-up biopsy appointment

messages.text: Haha no worries, let's do Saturday. Quick bio: I'm a Libra who definitely overshares in calendar descriptions. Anyway, see you then!
Can we move this to after lunch?
I dropped the notes in the shared doc.
Please add that to next week's agenda.
Looks good to me, shipping this afternoon.
I'll send a clean summary once the meeting ends.
Can you confirm if legal already reviewed it?
Are we still on for brunch? I'm free Saturday morning.
Awesome, can't wait. Could you send me a calendar invite so I don't double-book?
